headline: VICI Properties: Stop Holding For The Dividend, Start Selling Puts For A Much Larger Yield
summary: VICI Properties (VICI) offers a 6.2% REIT yield and stable cash flow, but growth and tenant risks loom. Read here for a detailed investment analysis.
